ETA.description: Estimated time of arrival at destination.

MMSI.description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI): unique 9-digit vessel identity.

attack-type.description: Suspected attack or manipulation type affecting this AIS observation.

course-over-ground.description: Observed course over ground in degrees.

destination.description: Destination declared in AIS static/voyage data.

detection-method.description: Method used to detect the anomaly (geofence, impossible movement, sensor fusion, etc.).

discrepancy-detail.description: Structured human-readable details explaining why this observation appears suspicious.

first-seen.description: First timestamp this observation was seen.

last-seen.description: Last timestamp this observation was seen.

name.description: Vessel name as broadcast over AIS.

observation-type.description: Classification of the shared record to distinguish routine telemetry from security-focused observations.

raw-message.description: Raw NMEA AIS message payload when available.

receiver-id.description: Identifier of the receiver or sensor producing this observation.

related-ais-object-uuid.description: UUID of a related ais object containing baseline vessel telemetry context for this observation.

speed-over-ground.description: Observed speed over ground in knots.

suspicion-score.description: Analyst or system confidence score (0-100) that the observation is malicious or manipulated.

description: Observation object for AIS telemetry and security anomalies, including spoofing and other AIS attacks. This template complements ais (baseline vessel data) and ais-info (source/provenance markings).
name: ais-observation
